name: ably.net:control
prose: # Control API v1 API Use the Control API to manage your applications, namespaces, keys, queues, rules, and more. Detailed information on using this API can be found in the Ably developer documentation. Control API is currently in Beta. ## Getting started The Control API v1 API is a JSON REST API. All endpoints are relative to the base URL `https://control.ably.net/v1`. ## Authentication Every request must include an `Authorization: Bearer ` header with your access token. ## API reference ### GET /accounts/{account_id}/apps Lists apps Returns a list of records. Sample response: ```json [ { "id": 1 }, { "id": 2 } ] ``` ### POST /accounts/{account_id}/apps Creates an app ### GET /apps/{app_id}/keys Lists app keys Returns a list of records. Sample response: ```json [ { "id": 1 }, { "id": 2 } ] ``` ### POST /apps/{app_id}/keys Creates a key ### PATCH /apps/{app_id}/keys/{key_id} Updates a key ### POST /apps/{app_id}/keys/{key_id}/revoke Revokes a key ### GET /apps/{app_id}/namespaces Lists namespaces Returns a list of records. Sample response: ```json [ { "id": 1 }, { "id": 2 } ] ``` ### POST /apps/{app_id}/namespaces Creates a namespace ### PATCH /apps/{app_id}/namespaces/{namespace_id} Updates a namespace ### DELETE /apps/{app_id}/namespaces/{namespace_id} Deletes a namespace ### GET /apps/{app_id}/queues Lists queues Returns a list of records. Sample response: ```json [ { "id": 1 }, { "id": 2 } ] ``` ### POST /apps/{app_id}/queues Creates a queue ### DELETE /apps/{app_id}/queues/{queue_id} Deletes a queue ### GET /apps/{app_id}/rules Lists Reactor rules Returns a list of records. Sample response: ```json [ { "id": 1 }, { "id": 2 } ] ``` ### POST /apps/{app_id}/rules Creates a Reactor rule ### GET /apps/{app_id}/rules/{rule_id} Gets a reactor rule by rule ID Returns a single record. ### PATCH /apps/{app_id}/rules/{rule_id} Updates a Reactor rule ### DELETE /apps/{app_id}/rules/{rule_id} Deletes a Reactor rule ### PATCH /apps/{id} Updates an app ### DELETE /apps/{id} Deletes an app ### POST /apps/{id}/pkcs12 Updates app's APNs info from a `.p12` file ### GET /me Get token details Returns a single record.
